## Checklist

- [ ] The site allows AI/software product submissions
- [ ] The site is live and operational (not a dead link)
- [ ] DR is ≥ 15 (verified via [Ahrefs free checker](https://ahrefs.com/website-authority-checker) or similar)
- [ ] Entry is placed in the correct category
- [ ] Row number is updated
- [ ] No duplicate — site is not already in the list
- [ ] PR title is descriptive (e.g., "Add SiteName to AI Directories")
